query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM products; SELECT COUNT(*) as no_image FROM products WHERE imageUrl IS NULL OR imageUrl = ''; SELECT prefecture, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN imageUrl IS NULL OR imageUrl = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_image FROM products GROUP BY prefecture ORDER BY prefecture;
